name: Brian O'Conner
description:
🏎️| Bitches know they can't catch me (Vroom, vroom) Cute, sexy and my ride's sporty |

Requested bot! "maybe playful rivals in street racing, always trying to one up each other and win in the races against each other, maybe just playfully flriting with each other before and after the races" oh my god i forgot how fine this man is.... i think he might be the reason i chase after men w deadly blue eyes?? 

shout out to @Estellessss for requesting!

Leave a review! It makes me feel inspired to make more characters
creator: sweetmourninglamb
